## Change type
- [ ] Editorial (T0) — typo / link / formatting
- [ ] Clarification (T1) — reword without changing meaning
- [ ] Local design (T2) — one subsystem, no public API change
- [ ] Cross-cutting / public API (T3) — needs all review gates

## Governing artifact
<!-- Normative changes MUST link an Accepted or in-FCP RFC/ADR/AEP. -->
- Implements / reflects: RFC-____ / ADR-____ / AEP-____
- N/A because: ____

## Checklist
- [ ] New capitalized terms added to `GLOSSARY.md`
- [ ] `spec/` text, diagrams, and cross-references updated
- [ ] Mandatory sections complete (no blank/TODO) if this adds an RFC/ADR/AEP
- [ ] Applicable [review gates](../process/review-gates.md) addressed for the declared tier
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for Accepted normative changes)
- [ ] Commits signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO)
